dedupe_policy: publisher + article_id + title + product_or_device_scope + error_signature_if_any + source_url + canonical_id

records.title: Troubleshoot problems updating Windows
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support troubleshooting article for Windows Update problems.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article text and supported Windows contexts; not user-verified.

records.title: Windows Update Troubleshooter
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support article for Windows Update troubleshooter flow.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article text; not proof of success on a device.

records.title: Get help with Windows upgrade and installation errors
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support article for Windows upgrade/install error guidance.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article text; not a canonical Dr.Debug fix.

records.title: If your iPhone won't turn on or the screen is black
records.error_signature_if_any: iPhone won't turn on; black screen; frozen/unresponsive
records.claim_supported: Official Apple Support article for iPhone black-screen/won't-turn-on guidance.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to listed iPhone article steps; not a hardware diagnosis.

records.title: If you can't update or restore your iPhone or iPod touch
records.error_signature_if_any: Can't update or restore iPhone/iPod touch
records.claim_supported: Official Apple Support article for update/restore recovery guidance.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article steps; restore paths may affect data depending on backup/state.

records.title: If your iPhone is stuck on the Apple logo
records.error_signature_if_any: iPhone stuck on Apple logo; progress bar not moving
records.claim_supported: Official Apple Support article for stuck-on-logo recovery-mode guidance.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article text; no board-level diagnosis.

records.title: Fix an installed Android app that isn't working
records.claim_supported: Official Google Play Help article for installed Android app troubleshooting.
records.limitations: Settings vary by device manufacturer; not user-verified.

records.title: Find problem apps by rebooting to safe mode on Android
records.error_signature_if_any: Problem app suspected; issue changes in safe mode
records.claim_supported: Official Android Help article for safe-mode problem-app isolation.
records.limitations: Exact safe-mode steps vary by device/manufacturer.

records.title: Fix problems downloading apps with basic troubleshooting steps
records.claim_supported: Official Google Play Help article for app download/install troubleshooting.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article text and Google Play context.

records.title: Troubleshoot and diagnose Firefox problems
records.claim_supported: Official Mozilla Support article for Firefox troubleshooting and diagnosis.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to Mozilla Support guidance; not user-verified.

records.title: Firefox can't load websites but other browsers can
records.error_signature_if_any: Firefox cannot load websites while other browsers can
records.claim_supported: Official Mozilla Support article for Firefox-specific website loading failures.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to matching Firefox symptoms; not proof of root cause without context.
